methodology: Mal CRAM · CBUAE AML/CFT · FATF Rec. 20/29 · FinCEN BSA (US BaaS)

templates.title: Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) — UAE FIU / goAML
templates.purpose: Report suspected money laundering or terrorist financing after investigation
templates.trigger: Suspicion identified; MLRO approval to file
templates.submittedTo: UAE Financial Intelligence Unit via goAML
templates.frequency: Ad hoc — without delay upon suspicion
templates.policyRef: Mal AML Policy §14 · CBUAE AML Rulebook

templates.title: Suspicious Activity Report (SAR) — FinCEN BSA E-File
templates.purpose: Report suspicious activity for US BaaS customers under FinCEN requirements
templates.trigger: Suspicion identified; SAR committee / MLRO approval
templates.frequency: Ad hoc — within 30 calendar days of initial detection (FinCEN)
templates.policyRef: FinCEN SAR regulations · Mal US BaaS AML Program

templates.title: Attempted Transaction Report — UAE FIU
templates.purpose: Report suspicious transactions that were attempted but not completed
templates.policyRef: CBUAE goAML guidance · Mal AML Policy §14.3

templates.title: Terrorist Property Report — UAE
templates.purpose: Report frozen or identified terrorist assets
templates.trigger: Terrorist financing match or designated person/asset identified
templates.submittedTo: UAE FIU · UAE Executive Office for Control & Non-Proliferation (sanctions)
templates.policyRef: UAE AML Law · UNSCR / UAE Local Terrorist Lists

templates.title: Sanctions Freeze Report — UAE competent authority
templates.purpose: Notify authorities that sanctioned assets have been frozen
templates.submittedTo: UAE Executive Office for Control & Non-Proliferation · UAE FIU

templates.title: OFAC Block Report — US BaaS
templates.purpose: Report blocked property under OFAC regulations
templates.trigger: OFAC SDN / sectoral sanctions true match
templates.submittedTo: OFAC · FinCEN (as applicable) · Partner sponsor bank
templates.policyRef: 31 CFR Chapter V · Mal US Sanctions Policy

templates.title: Currency Transaction Report (CTR) — FinCEN
templates.purpose: Report cash transactions exceeding USD 10,000 aggregate (US regime)
templates.trigger: Cash-in or cash-out ≥ USD 10,000 in single business day

templates.title: Large Cash Transaction Report — UAE (where applicable)
templates.purpose: Report cash transactions above regulatory threshold
templates.trigger: Cash transaction exceeds CBUAE / policy threshold

templates.title: Cross-Border Currency Report
templates.purpose: Declare movement of cash across borders where required

templates.title: Sanctions Match Notification — Regulator
templates.purpose: Notify prudential regulator of confirmed sanctions match
templates.trigger: Confirmed screening hit after Vital4 disposition

templates.title: FIU filing — draft workspace cover sheet
templates.purpose: Internal cover sheet before MLRO submits to FIU

templates.title: FIU Request for Information — response template
templates.purpose: Structured response to FIU or regulator information request
templates.trigger: RFI received from FIU / CBUAE / FinCEN

templates.title: FIU submission status tracker
templates.purpose: Track draft → submitted → acknowledged → feedback
templates.body:
FIU SUBMISSION STATUS — {{reportRef}}

Report type: {{reportType}}
Customer: {{customerName}} ({{customerId}})

| Stage | Date | Owner | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| Draft created (Jana) | {{draftDate}} | Jana | {{draftNotes}} |
| MLRO review | {{reviewDate}} | {{mlroName}} | {{reviewNotes}} |
| Submitted to FIU | {{submitDate}} | {{mlroName}} | FIU ref: {{fiuAckRef}} |
| Acknowledgement received | {{ackDate}} | — | |
| FIU feedback / follow-up | {{feedbackDate}} | — | {{feedbackSummary}} |

Retention: 5 years post relationship (UAE/US partition per policy)

templates.purpose: Quarterly board reporting on financial crime posture

templates.purpose: Monthly MLRO report to senior management

templates.title: MLRO Annual Report — UAE

templates.purpose: Notify regulator of material AML/CFT breach or control failure

templates.policyRef: CBUAE notification requirements · US partner bank agreement

templates.purpose: Periodic PEP exposure statistics for regulator

templates.purpose: Daily summary of sanctions screening activity

templates.purpose: Track customers with overdue KYC refresh or periodic review

templates.title: Case workload by investigator

templates.title: Regulatory examination pack — cover index
templates.purpose: Structured exam pack for CBUAE / US partner bank inspection
templates.body:
REGULATORY EXAMINATION PACK — INDEX
Exam reference: {{examRef}} · Sample size: {{sampleSize}} customers
Prepared: {{datePrepared}} · MLRO: {{mlroName}}

CONTENTS (per customer sample {{customerId}}):
□ 1. Complete customer profile
□ 2. Customer risk assessment (CRAM) — rating {{craRating}} · assessment ID {{assessmentId}}
□ 3. CDD/EDD evidence file
□ 4. UBO information (if entity)
□ 5. Transaction history ({{txnPeriod}})
□ 6. Alert history (Oscilar + Vital4)
□ 7. Investigation notes & disposition
□ 8. STR/SAR history
□ 9. Immutable audit trail (cram_ref linked)
□ 10. Policy version at time of decision
□ 11. User access logs (restricted)
□ 12. Screening history (Vital4 authority)
□ 13. Risk scoring methodology excerpt
□ 14. Model validation summary (SR 11-7)

Generation target: < 2 hours per Mal platform architecture spec.

templates.title: STR / SAR trend analysis
templates.purpose: Analytical report on filing trends and typologies

templates.title: Country exposure heat map report
templates.purpose: Geographic risk exposure analytics

templates.title: Email — Missing KYC documents request
templates.purpose: Professional customer communication requesting missing CDD documents
templates.trigger: KYC incomplete · onboarding blocked · periodic review
templates.body:
Subject: Action required — Please provide additional verification documents | Mal Bank

Dear {{customerName}},

Thank you for choosing Mal Bank. To complete your account verification and comply with regulatory requirements (Central Bank of the UAE / applicable US banking regulations), we need the following document(s):

{{missingDocumentsList}}

Please upload these securely via the Mal app by {{deadlineDate}}. If we do not receive them by this date, we may need to restrict account activity until verification is complete.

Why we need this:
Mal Bank is required under AML/CFT regulations to verify the identity of all customers and, where applicable, the source of funds. This protects you and the financial system.

How to submit:
1. Open the Mal app → Profile → Documents
2. Upload clear, colour copies (PDF or photo)
3. Ensure documents are valid and not expired

If you have questions, contact us at {{supportEmail}} or {{supportPhone}}. Please do not send documents via unsecured email.

Kind regards,
{{senderName}}
Customer Due Diligence Team
Mal Bank

── Internal note ──
Customer ID: {{customerId}} · CRA: {{craRating}} · DQ gate: BLOCKED until received · Retention: per AML policy

templates.title: Email — Source of funds / wealth clarification
templates.purpose: Request SoF/SoW documentation for EDD or investigation
templates.trigger: TM alert · profile deviation · high-value transaction · MLRO request
templates.body:
Subject: Information request — Source of funds / wealth | Mal Bank

Dear {{customerName}},

As part of our regulatory obligations to safeguard the financial system, we are reviewing activity on your account (ref: {{accountRef}}).

We kindly request the following information to help us understand the source of funds/wealth related to {{transactionOrActivity}}:

{{informationRequested}}

Examples of acceptable evidence:
• Salary slips / employment contract (last 3 months)
• Bank statements showing salary credits
• Business financial statements / tax returns
• Sale agreement (property, investments)
• Inheritance / gift documentation

Please provide this by {{deadlineDate}} via the secure document upload in the Mal app.

We appreciate your cooperation. Unusual delays may result in temporary restrictions on certain transactions, in line with our AML policy and regulatory requirements.

Kind regards,
{{senderName}}
Financial Crime Compliance
Mal Bank

── Internal ──
Case: {{caseId}} · Mohsen ref: {{investigationRef}} · Do NOT disclose investigation status (tipping-off)

templates.title: Email — Enhanced Due Diligence information request
templates.purpose: Formal EDD request for high-risk / PEP / complex customers
templates.trigger: CRA High · PEP · complex UBO · MLRO EDD workflow

templates.title: Email — Periodic review overdue reminder
templates.purpose: Remind customer to complete periodic KYC refresh
templates.body:
Subject: Reminder — Please complete your account review | Mal Bank

Dear {{customerName}},

Our records show your periodic account review is overdue (due date: {{dueDate}}). Regulatory requirements oblige us to keep customer information up to date.

Please complete the review in the Mal app within {{graceDays}} days to avoid restrictions on your account.

Steps:
1. Open Mal app → Account Review
2. Confirm or update your personal/business details
3. Reconfirm source of funds if requested

Kind regards,
Mal Bank Customer Care
